title: Kid and Law Challenge Big Mom
description: On pages 49–52, this part focuses on Unknown person #45, Unknown person #46, Unknown person #47, Yamato, Marco, Unknown person #48 as The Skull Dome battles reach their final forms as Sanji, Zoro, Kid, Law, Yamato, and the alliance push back against the emperors and their commanders.
scene: The Skull Dome battles reach their final forms as Sanji, Zoro, Kid, Law, Yamato, and the alliance push back against the emperors and their commanders.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #45
dialogue.text: Could you really call me your pops...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...If I can't let a brilliant youngster cut their teeth against me?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: whether it's for the 100th time, or the 100th...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #45
dialogue.text: ...I won't back down from his challenge!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If I did, that reckless kid would go rush off to his death somewhere...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #46
dialogue.text: ...and that's not happening on my watch.

dialogue.speaker: Yamato
dialogue.text: ...between ace and whitebeard, has been decided...

dialogue.speaker: Yamato
dialogue.text: ACE BEGAN TO CHANGE, LITTLE BY LITTLE.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The ill feelings within him... the demon's blood...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #47
dialogue.text: That dark shadow looming over him...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...Dampened, as if being diluted by the sea itself...

dialogue.speaker: Yamato
dialogue.text: Two crews which had faced off before...

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 25 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on battle momentum, shifting alliances, and character resolve.
